speaker: speaker1
text: You're made a good choice . This china tea set is unusual .

speaker: speaker2
text: Jingdezhen ? Isn't it called ' the capital of porcelain ' ?

speaker: speaker2
text: This is the very thing I've been dreaming of .

speaker: speaker1
text: It is the best quality porcelain-the famous egg-shell China .

speaker: speaker1
text: But it is really worth the price .
